source.sourcePath: raw/sources/DHF (인허가)/01_HAD1717MC, MG/03_설계개발 출력/02_CCL 및 승인원/승인원/기구/환경자료/동인산업/H&Abyz MSDS& 시험성적서/304_KOR_v0.0 _MSDS.pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: 304 제품에 대한 세아창원특수강 물질안전보건자료로, 유해성 분류, 구성성분, 노출기준, 운송정보 및 국내외 법적규제를 제시한다.
sourceSummary.officialUse: 산업안전보건법 제41조 규정에 의거 작성된 MSDS로서 304 물질의 취급, 저장, 보호구, 폐기, 운송 및 규제 확인에 사용된다.
keyPoints: 유해성·위험성 분류에는 자기발열성 물질 및 혼합물 구분1, 특정표적장기 독성(1회노출) 구분3(호흡계 자극), 인화성 고체 구분2, 심한 눈 손상성/눈 자극성 구분2가 포함된다.
주요 구성성분은 Ni 8.0~10.5%, Cr 18~20%, Fe Max. 66.3% 등으로 제시된다.

entities.evidence: 이 자료는 산업안전보건법 제 41조 규정에 의거 작성된 것 임.

concepts.pageTarget: Serious Eye Damage Eye Irritation Category 2

concepts.name: 산업안전보건법 제41조 MSDS 작성

evidence.claim: The document is an MSDS for product 304.
The MSDS states it was prepared under Article 41 of the Korean Occupational Safety and Health Act.
evidence.evidenceText: [ 이 자료는 산업안전보건법 제 41조 규정에 의거 작성된 것 임. ]
evidence.pageTarget: Korean Occupational Safety and Health Act Article 41 MSDS

evidence.claim: The supplier is SeAH Changwon Integrated Special Steel Corporation.
The supplier address is 147 Jeokhyeon-ro, Changwon-si, Gyeongnam.
The emergency contact is Safety Environment Team, Oh Dae-young, +82-55-269-6149.
evidence.pageTarget: SeAH Changwon Integrated Special Steel Emergency Contact

evidence.claim: The product is classified as self-heating substances and mixtures category 1.
The product is classified as STOT single exposure category 3 for respiratory irritation.
evidence.pageTarget: Specific Target Organ Toxicity Single Exposure Category 3

evidence.claim: The product is classified as flammable solid category 2.
The product is classified as serious eye damage/eye irritation category 2.
evidence.pageTarget: Serious Eye Damage Eye Irritation Category 2

evidence.claim: The signal word is Danger.
The hazard statement H251 is listed for self-heating fire hazard.
evidence.evidenceText: H251 자기발열성: 화재를 일으킬 수 있음

evidence.claim: The hazard statement H335 is listed for respiratory irritation.
evidence.evidenceText: H335 호흡기계 자극을 일으킬 수 있음

evidence.claim: The composition includes nickel at 8.0 to 10.5 percent with CAS No. 7440-02-0.
The composition includes chromium at 18 to 20 percent with CAS No. 7440-47-3.
The composition includes iron up to 66.3 percent with CAS No. 7439-89-6.
The stated appearance is a metallic gray solid.
The melting/freezing point is 1,451 degrees Celsius.
Domestic occupational exposure limits are provided for several components including carbon, silicon, manganese, nickel and chromium.
evidence.evidenceText: 국내규정 C TWA:5mg/m3 ... Si TWA:10mg/m3 ... Mn TWA - 1mg/m3 ... Ni TWA - 1mg/m3 ... Cr TWA:0.5mg/m3 Cr(Metal)

evidence.claim: Legal regulation status is listed under the Occupational Safety and Health Act, Hazardous Chemicals Control Act, Dangerous Goods Safety Control Act, Waste Management Act, and other domestic and foreign regulations.
evidence.evidenceText: 15. 법적규제 현황 가. 산업안전보건법에 의한 규제 ... 나. 유해화학물질관리법에 의한 규제 ... 다. 위험물안전관리법에 의한 규제 ... 라. 폐기물 관리법에 의한 규제 ... 마. 기타 국내 및 외국법에 의한 규제

evidence.claim: Under the Occupational Safety and Health Act, nickel and chromium are listed as workplace monitoring target substances, controlled hazardous substances, and special health examination substances.
evidence.evidenceText: Ni 작업환경대상 측정물질(측정주기:6개월), 관리대상유해물질,특수건강진단물질(진단주기:12개월),노출성기준물질 Cr 작업환경대상 측정물질(측정주기:6개월), 관리대상유해물질,특수건강진단물질(진단주기:12개월),노출성기준물질
evidence.pageTarget: Korean Occupational Safety and Health Act Nickel Chromium Controls

reviewFlags.reason: Source metadata authoritySignal indicates MFDS/domestic, but the source text identifies Industrial Safety and Health Act MSDS context and does not mention MFDS.
The document does not state a medical device product model; productModels uses the stated product name 304.
OCR quality issues are present in Korean text, including apparent typos such as 국낸, 함유랑, 화헉적, 개성횟수, and 한국산업언전보건공단.
